__inputs.name: DS_INFLUXDB
__inputs.label: InfluxDB
__inputs.description: Datasource InfluxDB (Flux) verso il bucket dei sensori

targets.query:
from(bucket: "casa_sensori")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "clima")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "device_name"])
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])

from(bucket: "casa_sensori")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "clima")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cooling_setpoint")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "device_name"])
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])

from(bucket: "casa_sensori")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "clima")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "device_name"])
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])

from(bucket: "casa_sensori")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "clima")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "air_quality" or r._field == "dust_level" or r._field == "fine_dust_level" or r._field == "odor_level")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "device_name", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["device_name", "_field"])

from(bucket: "casa_sensori")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "clima")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "power_w")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "device_name"])
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])

from(bucket: "casa_sensori")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "clima")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "energy_wh")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "device_name"])
  |> group(columns: ["device_name"])

from(bucket: "casa_sensori")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "clima")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "power_state" or r._field == "ac_mode" or r._field == "fan_mode" or r._field == "oscillation_mode" or r._field == "dust_filter_status" or r._field == "hepa_filter_status")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["device_name", "_field", "_value"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["device_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
